text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru runs over to me,<n>beaming
enthusiastically!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Reverse fortune-telling time! The hour<n>has finally
dawned upon us, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm usually the one doing the<n>fortune-telling, right?
But this time<n>around, I bring an opportunity so
incredible it's going to blow your<n>mind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I want you to tell my future.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please, do me the honor! How do you<n>think my
race this afternoon will turn<n>out?

Predicting the future is not in my<n>repertoire, but
before I can say<n>anything...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I think...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I had a vision of Fukukitaru's future...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I jump as a voice practically<n>materializes next to
us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Oh, Manhattan Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ever enigmatic and mysterious... Do<n>you walk the
boundary between this<n>world and the next even
now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And did you just say you had a<n>vision? And that
vision was about my<n>future?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um... Well, sort of...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You appeared in my dream last night...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I did?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what did you see? Surely a dream<n>from
someone as mysterious as<n>yourself will proffer
some sort of clue<n>for me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whatever it is, I'd love to hear it!
...Okay.
Well, we were at today's<n>scrimmage... and you...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I have a bad feeling about this. I take<n>Manhattan
Cafe aside to speak to<n>her in private.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru came in last place in my<n>dream...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She was swallowed up by a<n>mysterious shadow
chasing her from<n>behind...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I knew it'd be bad... How should we<n>break the
news to her?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Traineeer. Cafeee. You can't<n>just keep all
the deets to yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Fill me in! What happened to me in<n>your dream?
choice_data_list: You blew the competition out of the water.

text_block_list.text: Wh-what did you just say?! Is that<n>true, Cafe?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I finished dead last?! As in I didn't<n>even stand a
chance?! Not even a<n>chance of... chance of... the
chupacabra?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... you were trapped by a black<n>shadow... It
caught you from behind...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ain'tnoway! But considering it'syour dream, there must be sometruth to it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If I get caught by the chupacabra, it's<n>over for
me...
Later, at the scrimmage...

Outta my way! No way I'm letting<n>myself get
gobbled up!

text_block_list.name: Leading Racer
text_block_list.text:
H-huh?! Fukukitaru?! What's got you<n>so
flustered...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You better run fast, or you'll get eaten<n>by the
chupacabra too! That<n>blood-sucking fiend!
What?! What are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's starting to put pressure on the<n>runner in the
lead. It looks like her<n>anxiety is giving her a boost.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I won?! And not only that, I blew<n>everyone out of
the water?!

Great fortune must be coming my<n>way,
Cafe-guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, I don't see any<n>reason not to
go wild. I have nothing<n>to be scared of anymore!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Heave-ho, pull in the victory haul!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I ended up lying to her, but<n>Matikanefukukitaru's
complete faith<n>in the omen empowers her to
secure<n>a huge victory.
